channel.title: Kam Woh Ng — Blog
channel.description: Notes on video diffusion, generative neural rendering, world models, and research engineering.

item.title: Agents, Skills, and Natural Language as the Next Abstraction Layer
item.description: What agents and skills really are, and why natural language is the next abstraction layer in programming — written for engineers trying to make sense of the AI era without wading through official docs.

item.title: Hello, World — and how this blog is built
item.description: A meta first post: how a static GitHub Pages site gets indexable blog posts, view counts, and a real comment thread — without a backend.
